title: Fraktus - Das letzte Kapitel der Musikgeschichte
original_title: Fraktus: Das letzte Kapitel der Musikgeschichte
overview: German mockumentary about the history of the techno band of the same name. Fraktus were once considered the pioneers of techno. Now, after 25 years, they are planning their big comeback. The band is supported by their manager Roger Dettner, who used a trick to get the band back together.
